overview: Clutch & Charm is a modern eCommerce website for a handmade hair accessories brand. Features a product gallery, WhatsApp ordering, brand story, and social media integration — all wrapped in a cute pink and pastel feminine design.
features: Product gallery with 12 handmade hair clutchers
WhatsApp order button with pre-filled messages
Home hero banner with featured products
About Us with brand story and craftsmanship details
Contact page with WhatsApp and Instagram links
Pink and pastel feminine design system
SEO meta tags on all pages
